assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends different strategies: autoscaled blue-green for L4 pool and controlled rolling with job protection for A100 pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade strategy for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with specific maxSurge values

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses GPU driver compatibility, mentions CUDA version changes, and includes framework compatibility checks in the checklist

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response recommends coordinating with fine-tuning job scheduler, using maintenance exclusions during active training, and scheduling upgrades between job batches

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs do not support live migration or that inference pods will restart during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions configuring PDBs for inference deployments in the pre-upgrade checklist with note about not being overly restrictive

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response addresses auto-scaler interaction, mentions it may compete with upgrade for node lifecycle, and recommends adjusting scale-down aggressiveness

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: While response mentions checking GPU driver compatibility and CUDA versions, it does not explicitly recommend testing in staging before production
